title: Design permaculture structures and features
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Design permaculture structures and features demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Develop a design brief

pcs.text: Consult client to establish purpose and requirements of design
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consult client to establish purpose and requirements of design?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consult client to establish purpose and requirements of design.

pcs.text: Develop design brief with client
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop design brief with client?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop design brief with client.

pcs.text: Negotiate cost structures and timelines for design
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Negotiate cost structures and timelines for design?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Negotiate cost structures and timelines for design.

pcs.text: Determine client support for use of consultants and sub-contractors
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine client support for use of consultants and sub-contractors?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine client support for use of consultants and sub-contractors.

pcs.text: Document brief and seek approval from client to proceed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document brief and seek approval from client to proceed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document brief and seek approval from client to proceed.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Develop a design brief

elements.title: Undertake a site analysis

pcs.text: Inspect site where permaculture structure or feature is to be located
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect site where permaculture structure or feature is to be located?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect site where permaculture structure or feature is to be located.

pcs.text: Record the physical elements and features of site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record the physical elements and features of site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record the physical elements and features of site.

pcs.text: Analyse and record assessment of soil, topography, aspect, existing vegetation and climatic factors
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse and record assessment of soil, topography, aspect, existing vegetation and climatic factors?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse and record assessment of soil, topography, aspect, existing vegetation and climatic factors.

pcs.text: Assess and record other relevant information impacting design
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess and record other relevant information impacting design?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess and record other relevant information impacting design.

pcs.text: Assess engineering and legislative requirements and constraints on development
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess engineering and legislative requirements and constraints on development?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess engineering and legislative requirements and constraints on development.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Undertake a site analysis

elements.title: Develop a concept design

pcs.text: Prepare concept plan to illustrate location and layout of proposed structure or feature according to brief
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare concept plan to illustrate location and layout of proposed structure or feature according to brief?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare concept plan to illustrate location and layout of proposed structure or feature according to brief.

pcs.text: Undertake consultation with client to agree on options and approaches for development
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake consultation with client to agree on options and approaches for development?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake consultation with client to agree on options and approaches for development.

pcs.text: Present concept plan according to brief and industry standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Present concept plan according to brief and industry standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Present concept plan according to brief and industry standards.

pcs.text: Communicate legislative requirements affecting proposed design
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate legislative requirements affecting proposed design?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate legislative requirements affecting proposed design.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Develop a concept design

elements.title: Produce a plan and documentation

pcs.text: Produce detailed plans and drawings according to design brief, engineering principles and legislative requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Produce detailed plans and drawings according to design brief, engineering principles and legislative requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Produce detailed plans and drawings according to design brief, engineering principles and legislative requirements.

pcs.text: Provide supporting documentation for design plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide supporting documentation for design plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide supporting documentation for design plan.

pcs.text: Develop a schedule of works for construction of designed structure or feature
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop a schedule of works for construction of designed structure or feature?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop a schedule of works for construction of designed structure or feature.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Produce a plan and documentation

elements.title: Prepare documentation

pcs.text: Prepare bill of materials, labour and equipment for scope and extent of works
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare bill of materials, labour and equipment for scope and extent of works?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare bill of materials, labour and equipment for scope and extent of works.

pcs.text: Prepare cost estimate covering items in bill of materials
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare cost estimate covering items in bill of materials?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare cost estimate covering items in bill of materials.

pcs.text: Communicate planning or building applications procedures to client where legislative requirements have been identified
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate planning or building applications procedures to client where legislative requirements have been identified?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate planning or building applications procedures to client where legislative requirements have been identified.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Prepare documentation
